_instructions: About section content - tell your professional story and showcase key metrics.
content: Supply Chain Analyst with 4+ years of experience supporting inventory planning, logistics coordination, procurement operations, warehouse reporting, and supply chain analytics across high-volume business environments. Experienced in analyzing inventory movement, shipment performance, supplier metrics, and operational KPIs using Excel, SQL, Power BI, and SAP ERP to improve reporting accuracy and op

erational visibility. Worked closely with procurement, logistics, warehouse, and planning teams to support replenishment activities, fulfillment performance, inventory reconciliation, transportation tracking, and demand planning processes. Strong background in operational reporting, data analysis, process improvement, and supply chain performance monitoring within fast-paced enterprise operations.
